title: Front Desk Snacks

content:
Beyond our more filling food options, our front desk supplies the following snacks at the moment:

  1. Tuna Snacks
  2. Cliff Bars
  3. Fruit (Banana)
  4. Pretzels & Hummus
  5. Assorted Chip Flavours
  6. Samosas
  7. Muffins

What else would you like to see available?

This poll is now closed. Top picks were:

  1. Sandra’s Special Pan Fried Tuna Sliders (these may or not be a real thing)
  2. Breakfast Parfaits
  3. Vegetable Cups

We’ll be talking with the front desk over Christmas to see how we can feasibly add any of these recommendations.
